name: Heroes Project
short_description: Turn based strategy, tough choices, short and long term consequences.
detailed_description:
HEROES ARE BACK.

Turn based strategy, tough choices, short and long term consequences.

Are you tired of mass-produced games with WEAK or BORING story ?

Gameplay:

If so, play Heroes Project, you will get the opportunity to grow your hero and city to defeat more enemies in turn-based combat. Learn spectacular spells that allow you to turn the face of battles And get to know the intriguing and interesting history contained in 2 campaigns.

Features:

  • 2 Types of Castles

  • 2 Story Campaigns!

  • 17 Unique units and their upgraded variants

  • Epic orchestral music

  • 20+ Spectacular spells!

  • 20+ Unique and transformative hero skills!

I got angry one day, 20-year anniversary of legend, and still no good successor.

We decided that if big companies can't make good continuation, we are going to do this ourselves.
